en.name: Northeast Sauerkraut 500g x5

en.description: Northeast Sauerkraut 500g x5 is a premium Chinese agricultural product sourced from Liaoning, Shenyang. Carefully selected, quality-controlled, and packaged for export. Suitable for wholesale distribution, food service, and retail.
